description: This id shoe captures the essence of the brand's versatility, showcasing its rugged styling. It pays tribute to the Texas cowboy lifestyle with the stitch detailing and textured upper. This pair comes with an extra pair of laces, in case your fashion mood takes a swing! Pair it with distressed jeans, a casual check shirt and a tonal belt to recapture the masculine flamboyance of the Wild West. Upper Black shoe made of genuine leather upper for maximum durability and style Tapered toe for comfort and style Lace-up system for a snug, customised Fit Lightly padded tongue and collar for a great snug fit Perforations on the forefoot and synthetic overlays on the lateral side Midsole Full length EVA midsole for comfort and support Cushioned footbed for added comfort Outsole Lightweight, slip-resistant textured rubber outsole for better shock absorption Shoe care Wipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shine Do not store in direct sunlight
